title: Mark as read: ReadPosition/set on chat open
description:
## Why
Unread counts need to be kept accurate as the user reads messages.

## What
- On chat select (and on new message arriving while chat is open and scrolled to bottom), call ReadPosition/set with lastReadMessageId = id of most recent visible message
- Update local unreadCount to 0 for that chat after successful set
- Do not call set if lastReadMessageId has not changed
close_reason: Superseded; replaced by issues under jmap-chat-tui-s2e (egui) and new TUI epic
